response:
To compute the **sample variance** of the data set:

$$
\{-22, 22, 11, -19, 8, 7\}
$$

---

### Step 1: Find the mean (average) of the data set

$$
\text{Mean} = \frac{-22 + 22 + 11 - 19 + 8 + 7}{6} = \frac{1}{6}
$$

---

### Step 2: Compute the squared deviations from the mean

We calculate $(x_i - \bar{x})^2$ for each data point.

$$
\begin{align*}
(-22 - \frac{1}{6})^2 &= \left(-\frac{131}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{17161}{36} \\
(22 - \frac{1}{6})^2 &= \left(\frac{131}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{17161}{36} \\
(11 - \frac{1}{6})^2 &= \left(\frac{65}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{4225}{36} \\
(-19 - \frac{1}{6})^2 &= \left(-\frac{113}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{12769}{36} \\
(8 - \frac{1}{6})^2 &= \left(\frac{47}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{2209}{36} \\
(7 - \frac{1}{6})^2 &= \left(\frac{41}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{1681}{36} \\
\end{align*}
$$

---

### Step 3: Sum the squared deviations

$$
\text{Sum of squared deviations} = \frac{17161 + 17161 + 4225 + 12769 + 2209 + 1681}{36}
$$

$$
= \frac{47046}{36}
$$
